properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What I have to give to You Cannot be bought or sold It can't be wrapped up in a box Or tied with strings of gold It isn't perfect and You'll see It isn't even new But Jesus, it's the only treasure I can give to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Me, My gift is Me All I am and all I'll ever be I'm not ashamed for the world to see That it's Me, My gift is Me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus You're the greatest gift The world will ever know Coming down from heaven Just to live Your Love below With all that You have done for Me The least that I can do Is give all that I know of Me To all I know of You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Of all the gifts man could give It's nice to know That I can give His favorite gift The one that thrills Him so

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Me, My gift is Me All I am and all I'll ever be I'm not ashamed for the world to see That it's Me, My gift is Me Me, My gift is Me
